case_title: CHASE BANK USA, N.A. VS. WILLIAM T. PICKERING et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION PER CCP 395 (B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PICKERING, WILLIAM T. $8,987.74 PRINCIPAL, $600.41 INTEREST, $274.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,862.65, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION RE: CALCULATION OF INTEREST. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT PICKERING, WILLIAM T.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT PICKERING, WILLIAM T. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-07-2010
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A. SERVED MAR-22-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PICKERING, WILLIAM T.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $274.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT PICKERING, WILLIAM T.
